title: LLPT Double Sided Nano Tape | 50mm*5m*1mm Strong Mounting Tape | Heavy Duty Gel Tape | Washable No Residue Transparent Tape for Home Office Store Deco Card Poster Photo Wall (LPNT50)
features: CONVENIENT AND EFFICIENT: Farewell traditional fixing method, no more drilling holes and hammering nails. This tape uses the newest technology to process gel with butyl adhesive, make it reusable for thousand of times, reduce the frictional coefficient for quicker bonding.

WIDE APPLICATION: Widely used for wall, floor, doors and windows, address plaques, signs, posters, photo frame, chair pad, hold carpet onto floor, metal mailbox, mirrors, hangers. It can also be used in home, office, car, wardrobe, tabletop, bathroom, store decorating temporarily.

USING METHOD: 1. Clean the material surface and keep it dry. 2. Cut the right size you need. 3. Peel off tape’s protective film. 4. Stick the tape onto object. 5. Press the tape as hard as possible all along the object. 6. To reuse, remove it from the surface and wash it with clean water only. Reuse after it dries naturally or hair dryer.

HIGH PERFORMANCE: This double sided nano gel tape is design to hold 5.2 lbs in short term and 8.5 lbs after 4 hours. It can be used superior working range from -10℉ to 200℉ and UV stabilized that it can be used outdoor as well, except for alkali metal. It has high corrosion resistance to any materials, low water absorption and works in moisture environment.

WARM REMINDER: It is safe for glass, metal, marble, tiles, wood, plastic and other smooth surfaces. NOT for rough and painting surfaces or the adhesive will DAMAGE THE PAINT. It is washable if the adhesive is dirty. Never use wipes or detergent, just flushing by clean water and leave the tape dry naturally.
